Here is the actual working code used for sending Email :-> 

var tblInvoiceHead = (from ih in ttInvcHead where (ih.RowMod == "A" || ih.RowMod == "U") select ih).FirstOrDefault();

if (tblInvoiceHead == null)
    throw new Ice.BLException("No invoice found to process.");

int invoiceNumInput = tblInvoiceHead.InvoiceNum;  
string inputXml = tblInvoiceHead.InvoiceComment ?? "";
string folderPathInput = @"\\EPICORSI\EpicorData\ARInvAttachment";

if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(folderPathInput))
    throw new Ice.BLException("Folder path is not provided.");

var xmlTuple = (Tuple<string>)this.InvokeFunction( "libCreateXML","createXML",Tuple.Create(invoiceNumInput, inputXml, folderPathInput));
string xmlResult = xmlTuple.Item1;

string inputPdfBase64 = "";

var emailTuple = (Tuple<string>)this.InvokeFunction("libCreateXML","sendEmailAttch",Tuple.Create(inputPdfBase64, inputXml, "testmail@mydomain.com"));  //<< set mail here 
string emailResult = emailTuple.Item1;
